name: Energy First Golf Academy
address: 7755 St Marlo Country Club Pkwy, Duluth, GA 30097
about: Energy First Golf Academy is a state-of-the-art indoor golf training facility located in Suwanee, GA. They specialize in personalized golf coaching for all skill levels, utilizing advanced simulation technology and a philosophy focused on the mental and emotional aspects of the game. The facility features eight large bays equipped with premium launch monitors and simulators to provide an immersive learning environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium launch monitor technology (SkyTrak and GCQuads) for detailed swing analysis
Focus on mental game and energy-based coaching philosophy for holistic improvement
Expert coaching staff with decades of professional and collegiate experience

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service.

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced launch monitor for ball tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You are welcome to bring your own clubs, but rentals may be available upon request.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are permitted, as the facility focuses on a dedicated golf training environment.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18-hole simulation sessions typically take 1-2 hours depending on player pace and simulator software capabilities.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Energy First Golf is kid-friendly and offers junior programs and instruction for young golfers.
